briefings.title: Morning briefings
briefings.body: The morning briefing is your fastest way to see priorities, risks, and what needs a decision.
examples: Give me my morning briefing.
What should I care about first today?

approvals.title: Approval boundaries
approvals.body: The agent can gather context and prepare drafts, but external sends and risky writes stay approval-gated.
examples: Show me anything waiting for approval.
Draft the reply first.

asking_for_help.title: How to ask
asking_for_help.body: Short, direct commands work best. Name the outcome you want and the system involved.
examples: Check my inbox for anything urgent.
Prep me for my next meeting.

crm_lookup.title: CRM lookups
crm_lookup.body: You can ask for account history, follow-ups, and pipeline risk using client or company names.
examples: Look up Acme Corp in the CRM.
Which follow-ups are overdue?

email_drafts.title: Email drafting
email_drafts.body: The agent can classify mail, summarise intent, and prepare a reply draft for you to approve.
examples: Draft a reply to Sarah about the contract.
Summarise the urgent emails and suggest replies.

meeting_prep.title: Meeting prep
meeting_prep.body: Ask for prep any time you want attendees, context, risks, and open questions before a meeting.
examples: Prep me for my next meeting.
What do I need to know before the 2pm call?

weekly_review.title: Weekly review
weekly_review.body: The weekly review pulls together wins, risks, blocked items, and patterns from the week.
examples: Generate my weekly review.
What should I expect in Friday's review?

feedback.title: Feedback loop
feedback.body: By the end of week one, ask what feels noisy, missing, or over-alerted so the agent can be tuned.
examples: What should we change about the briefings?
Here are the alerts I want less of.

anomaly_detection.title: Anomaly detection
anomaly_detection.body: Founder and reporting-heavy roles can ask for KPI anomalies instead of scanning raw dashboards.
examples: Show me KPI anomalies from this week.
What changed unexpectedly?

pipeline_focus.title: Pipeline focus
pipeline_focus.body: Sales-oriented roles should ask for deals likely to slip, missing next steps, and overdue follow-ups.
examples: What deals are at risk?
Which opportunities need a next step?

follow_up_commands.title: Follow-up commands
follow_up_commands.body: Use the agent to turn stale conversations into clean follow-up drafts and task queues.
examples: Draft a follow-up for silent prospects.
Queue today's follow-ups.

sla_tracking.title: SLA tracking
sla_tracking.body: Support roles can ask for tickets close to breach and queues ordered by urgency.
examples: Which tickets are near SLA breach?
Triage the support queue.

client_history.title: Client history
client_history.body: Before replying to escalations, ask for recent incidents, promises, and account context.
examples: Pull the history for this client.
What happened on this account recently?

document_chasing.title: Document chasing
document_chasing.body: Admin and finance roles can ask for missing documents, owners, and the next nudge to send.
examples: What documents are still missing?
Draft a chase for the unsigned form.

scheduling.title: Scheduling
scheduling.body: Admin roles can use the agent to spot conflicts, missing prep, and calendar overload.
examples: Check for calendar conflicts this week.
Who needs prep before today's meetings?

finance_docs.title: Finance documents
finance_docs.body: Finance roles should use the agent to track missing receipts, invoices, and contract support files.
examples: What finance documents are missing?
Show me invoice follow-ups due today.

revenue_reporting.title: Revenue reporting
revenue_reporting.body: Finance roles can request concise reporting snapshots instead of raw exports.
examples: Give me a revenue snapshot.
Summarise collection risk this week.

campaign_kpis.title: Campaign KPIs
campaign_kpis.body: Marketing roles can ask for KPI changes, launch blockers, and content deadlines in one view.
examples: Give me today's marketing brief.
What campaign metrics changed this week?

lead_scoring.title: Lead scoring
lead_scoring.body: Marketing roles can ask for lead-quality shifts and handoff issues before they hit sales.
examples: Summarise lead score changes.
Which leads need better follow-up?
